items.title: Can Exclusive Experiences Like "1850" Strengthen American Express' (AXP) Competitive Edge With Affluent Customers?
items.description: American Express has opened "1850 by American Express®," an exclusive pop-up lounge for Platinum and Centurion cardholders at the ARIA Resort & Casino in Las Vegas, providing premium hospitality and event access from November 13 to December 17 to coincide with major city events including the Formula 1 Grand Prix. This initiative highlights American Express’s continued efforts to enhance value for its premium members, aiming to attract younger, affluent customers by offering experiential...
